narrative:
DRIVER
NZD leads H4 CSM at 100 with AUD close behind at 88, both accelerating hard against D1 baselines in a Risk-Off High regime that is being overridden by US-Iran peace deal news collapsing the USD proxy to 0 on H4. AUDJPY is the cleanest expression given the 0.90 AUDUSD correlation amplifying AUD strength into JPY weakness, with NZDUSD and NZDJPY confirming the same cluster move. CHF fading from D1 100 to H4 77 means USDCHF H4 Strong Sell is losing its structural anchor and should not be treated as a primary vehicle.

MOMENTUM
Gaining: AUDJPY CMP 55 with H4 rising and D1 steady, USDJPY D1 at 86 rising sharply though H4 fading to 51
Fading: GBPUSD CMP 41 with both D1 and H4 decelerating, NZDUSD CMP 39 with D1 and H4 both falling, NZDJPY CMP 47 with H4 dropping sharply

WATCH
Any confirmed Hormuz shipping lane reopening headline hits USDCAD directly, CAD accelerating on H4 CSM points to further USDCAD upside reversal failure
ECB speaker reiterating rate path triggers EURUSD, EUR H4 CSM accelerating from 0 to 66 makes a break above D1 sell resistance the key level to watch
Fed speaker adding policy clarity drives USDJPY, D1 momentum at 86 rising means a hawkish signal extends the D1 buy toward new highs

themes.theme: US-Iran peace deal hopes driving risk-on sentiment
Oil price collapse on Hormuz reopening expectations
ECB inflation fighting rhetoric supporting Euro
Japanese fiscal stimulus offsetting BoJ concerns
Fed policy ambiguity clouding Dollar outlook
Safe-haven flows to CHF and JPY reversing
Commodity currencies underperforming amid weak oil

key_observation: Strong risk-on mood driven by US-Iran peace deal hopes is pressuring safe-haven currencies and the USD broadly. Oil collapse to two-week lows is particularly damaging to commodity-linked currencies. ECB inflation rhetoric provides some EUR support despite broader USD weakness.
watch: Resolution of Iran negotiations, oil price stabilization levels, Fed communications on rate path, ECB rate decision implications, BoJ intervention necessity
